opsworks.instance.blockdevicemapping.Dev.Docs: The device name that is exposed to the instance, such as `/dev/sdh`. For the root device, you can use the explicit device name or you can set this parameter to `ROOT_DEVICE` and AWS OpsWorks Stacks will provide the correct device name.

opsworks.instance.blockdevicemapping.Ebs.Docs: An `EBSBlockDevice` that defines how to configure an Amazon EBS volume when the instance is launched. You can specify either the `VirtualName` or `Ebs`, but not both.

opsworks.instance.blockdevicemapping.NoD.Docs: Suppresses the specified device included in the AMI's block device mapping.

opsworks.instance.blockdevicemapping.Vir.Docs: The virtual device name. For more information, see [BlockDeviceMapping](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_BlockDeviceMapping.html). You can specify either the `VirtualName` or `Ebs`, but not both.
